use_cases: Displaying hierarchical navigation paths in web applications
Helping users understand their current location within a site's structure
Enabling quick navigation to parent pages in e-commerce product catalogs
Providing accessible breadcrumb trails for admin dashboards and settings pages
Supporting SEO-friendly navigation in content-heavy websites
ai_summary: A minimalist breadcrumb navigation component from Ant Design library that displays hierarchical path navigation. Renders a clickable trail of items with customizable links and separators, commonly used to show users their current location within a site's structure and enable quick navigation to parent pages.
